name: Forgotten Realms Core Test Pack
author: Reedy's Web Designs
description: Internal MasterForge Studio test pack for validating World → Region → Location hierarchy, scene/background inheritance, theme switching, and import behaviour. Not for commercial distribution.
importNotes: Designed for the new hierarchy: World → Region → Location.
Regions and locations include themeId/defaultThemeId plus background fields for scene fallback testing.
Background files are placeholders so switching can be tested immediately. Replace with generated art later.
